name: incalake-full-stack
description: Tour Management System - Full Stack Monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && composer install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:admin
scripts.clean: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:admin
scripts.clean:backend: cd backend && rm -rf vendor bootstrap/cache storage/logs/*.log
scripts.cache:clear: cd backend && php artisan cache:clear && php artisan config:clear && php artisan route:clear && php artisan view:clear
scripts.optimize: cd backend && composer install --optimize-autoloader --no-dev && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache

author: Incalake Development Team
